ew_context: Price failing at key Fibonacci resistance suggesting wave B correction complete, with wave C decline targeting lower support zones
pattern_desc: Failed bounce at 61.8% Fib resistance level with bearish EMA structure (20<50). High volatility (ATR 160) indicates strong institutional positioning
invalidation: Break above 5111 swing high invalidates the bearish Fibonacci rejection pattern
market_context: Gold facing headwinds from stronger USD positioning and geopolitical risk premium fading. Turbulent flow regime suggests institutional distribution
